episode.title: MTG Fast Finance Ep 522: SOS Brick Targets
episode.description:
The guys get you updated on all the Magic the Gathering card price action of the week, including meta updates, cards to watch and a call by call on the best SOS singles to target as speculative bricks.

Intro/Outro Music by Skylarka
